caption: A man with short grey hair, wearing a blue short-sleeved button-down shirt, stands at a wooden podium in a room with red walls and brown blinds. He is addressing a small group of people seated in front of him. To his left, a black speaker sits atop a stand. The audience includes a person in a plaid shirt and two women; one wears a blue and red patterned garment, and the other is dressed in black. A yellow and blue logo with the text "ORCA" is visible in the lower right of the scene. As the sequence progresses, the man gestures with his hand while speaking, and the camera slightly shifts its angle. The attendees remain seated and attentive, facing the speaker throughout the duration of the clip.
